summary: Resolved review-v1 ISSUE-1 (THREAD_ROW_COLUMNS projection stops resume columns leaking onto thread detail/summaries/draft-create; +integration test), ISSUE-2 (ResumeSection useEffect re-syncs inputs after a save-driven refresh; +UI test), ISSUE-3 (useCallback on onClose removes EgoSheet listener/focus churn, de-flakes the Escape test).
